rows.label: tev031101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Noborata about the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Noborata if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Noborata for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Noborata if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Noborata for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Noborata if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Noborata for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Don't you think the ship feels kind of
empty with no one but Ma-non aboard?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Mira is home to the Nopon and so many
other fascinating xenoforms, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0003
rows.name:
And since we're friends with you and you're
friends with them, doesn't it make sense
for them to come live on our ship?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0004
rows.name:
That would be so stimulating...
I just love a good cross-cultural
exchange, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0005
rows.name:
And if the whole reason for our journey was to learn
about as many planets and inhabitants as possible,
then Mira is is basically the mother lode, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Vandham is the large man you all hit yourselves in
the head for, correct? It is true that he's thinking
of signing a friendship treaty with the Nopon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0009
rows.name:
That would be swell, don't you
think? Just imagine NLA swarming
with with those walking lunches![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0010
rows.name:
We'd never need to worry about
emergency rations again, you know?
What an exciting time to be alive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0018
rows.name:
That friendship treaty you signed
with the Nopon has changed
everything, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Did you know the cute little guys have
started living here on our ship? I even
have a new Nopon friend named Chikochiko.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0020
rows.name:
He's a bit of a tightwad, but he's also
quite fun, if that makes sense? I guess he
just makes the ship a bit more colorful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0021
rows.name:
I hope more species come live
here, don't you? I just love a
good cross-cultural exchange...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Heck, the whole reason I came on this journey was
to learn about as many planets and people as possible,
you know? It's all I need to make me happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Did you know that the woman in BLADE
Tower debriefed us about the Bias who
attacked us in Valley of Oblivion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Do you think she's planning to blast them
to smithereens? Or will she hold off and
try to rescue more victims like us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0027
rows.name:
If you're curious, you might want
to have a sit-down with her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0035
rows.name:
You humans sure are forgiving,
aren't you? You even let the
Bias who attacked us live here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0036
rows.name:
But that's okay, you know? I even made
friends with a Bias named Selia![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Besides, she's not violent like
those other Bias, okay? She is
kind and very very reliable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0038
rows.name:
In fact, if I stick with her, I think my
life might actually get a bit...easier?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0039
rows.name:
I hope xenoforms from all kinds of
planets come to to our ship so I can
make even more friends, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0042
rows.name: Hey, did you hear what I heard?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0043
rows.name:
I guess the insects of Nightglow Forest
have undergone some kind of hyper-evolution
that allows them to walk on on two legs?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0044
rows.name:
That's rather terrifying,
don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Anyway, I was wondering if you might go to Nightglow Forest
and check it out? You know, as a favor? I think BLADE
should get to the bottom of this biological curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0054
rows.name:
Those awful bug-faced Orpheans
are in NLA now, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0055
rows.name:
Please don't tell me you humans signed
a friendship treaty with them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0056
rows.name:
They made all kinds of nasty weapons
for for the Growth, you know? I
think you're playing with fire![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0057
rows.name:
That's one species I don't
really want to to to do a
cultural exchange with, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0062
rows.name:
Did you hear about the Orphean who's
been running around asking what he
needs to do to prevent his extinction?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0069
rows.name:
Deep stuff, no? I wish I could
give him some pointers...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0070
rows.name:
Say, you seem like you know a
lot about not-dying, right?
Maybe you could go talk to him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0071
rows.name:
I think I last saw him in the
Ishmael Hills area of the
residential district, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Noborata about materials.

rows.label: tev031101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Noborata about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0063
rows.name:
The materials I'm dying to
get my hands on right now are
upgraded coils, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0072
rows.name:
I need them for these superpowered weapons
I'm building for for our members.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0073
rows.name:
But apparently the only way to
get them is to take out the
Growth's dangerous oc-servs? Yikes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0074
rows.name:
So basically, the weapon we need to
defeat those things can't be built
until we DO defeat those things?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0075
rows.name:
This BLADE stuff is really hard, don't
you think? I suppose I'll have to
tough it out one step at a time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0064
rows.name:
If we're all going to join BLADE, then I'll
need to mobilize the giants of Ma-non tech to
build some new, powerful gear for us, won't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0065
rows.name:
Chikochiko can drum up the money
and find excuses for us not to
pay it back, I suppose...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0066
rows.name:
And once Selia is armed with our weapons,
we should be pretty much...unbeatable?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0067
rows.name:
I guess maybe my journey across
space in search of alien kindred
spirits has finally paid off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031101_MSG0068
rows.name:
My world is a better place now,
you know? How about yours?[ST:wait ]
